name: Peanut Butter Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, baking powder, salt, and sugar.
2. Beat eggs; add peanut butter, milk, water, and butter; beat well.
3. Add peanut butter mixture to flour mixture, beating only until blended.
4. Grease muffin tins and fill 2/3 full.
5. Bake in a 400 degree oven for about 20 minutes.
6. Serve with butter and grape jelly.
